verb.frequency: Oxford English Corpus 빈도 상위 (이동 동사 대표)

meanings.example: I'm going to the FIU office tomorrow.
The merchant went under last quarter.

chunks.example: Let's go through the case file together.
Could you go over the STR draft once more?
Go ahead and submit the report.
This transaction goes against our internal policy.
Let me go into detail on the merchant's risk profile.

pronTip.title: GO 동사 발음 핵심
points: 강세: WHERE are you GOing? (의문문 강세)

listening.title: AML 케이스 진행 보고 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: How is the case going? Staff: It's going well. I went through all the transaction data. Manager: Did anything go against our policy? Staff: Yes, three transfers went against the limit. Manager: Go ahead and file the STR. Could you go over the draft with me first? Staff: Of course. I'll go into detail on each red flag.

blanks.suffix: well. I went through all the transaction data.

examples5.label: 이동
examples5.en: I'm going to the head office for a workshop tomorrow.

examples5.label: 진행
examples5.en: The merchant onboarding is going smoothly.

examples5.label: 위반
examples5.en: These transfers go against our threshold policy.
examples5.ko: 이 송금들은 우리 한도 정책에 위배됩니다.

examples5.label: 진행 승인
examples5.en: Go ahead with the STR submission.

examples5.label: 상세 설명
examples5.en: Let me go into detail about the alert logic.

writing5.en: I'm going to the FIU office tomorrow.
Let's go through the case file together.
Could you go over the STR draft once more?

writing5.ko: 이 거래는 우리 내부 정책에 위배됩니다.
writing5.en: This transaction goes against our internal policy.

writing5.ko: 가맹점의 리스크 프로파일에 대해 자세히 설명드릴게요.
writing5.en: Let me go into detail on the merchant's risk profile.

challenge3sec.en: Could you go over it once more?
I'm going to the head office tomorrow.

freewrite.situation: 본인이 최근 진행한 케이스의 검토 과정과 결과를 영어로 설명하세요. 어떤 자료를 검토했고, 무엇이 정책에 위배됐고, 어떻게 진행했는지 GO 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: go through, go over, go ahead, go against, go into detail
freewrite.placeholder: 예: Last week I went through 6 months of transaction data for a high-risk merchant. Several transfers went against our cross-border threshold...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
진행 보고, 자료 검토, 진행 승인 — GO 동사가 진행·전개의 핵심!

dialog.text: How's the project going?
It's going well. We're going through the second phase.
Good. Go ahead with the timeline you proposed.
Could you go over my draft when you have time?
Sure, I'll go through it this afternoon.
Thanks. Feel free to go into detail on any concerns.
I heard one of our merchants went against the new threshold.
Yes. I went through the data — three transactions went over the limit.
Did the merchant go through proper enhanced due diligence?
They did. But the volume went up sharply after that.
Let's go into detail on this case. Go over their last 3 months of activity.
Already started. I'll have a summary ready tomorrow. Then we can decide whether to go ahead with offboarding.

rolePlay.scenario: 본부장에게 정책 위반 가맹점 케이스를 보고하고 다음 단계를 의논하세요. 무엇을 검토했고, 어떻게 위반됐고, 어떻게 진행할지 GO 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Walk me through this merchant case. What did you go through, what went wrong against our policy, and how do you want to go ahead from here?

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
진행 안내, 검토 요청, 위반 통지 — 격식 갖춘 GO 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Hi, could you go through the attached file when you have time?
Sure, I'll go over it tomorrow morning.
Thanks. Go ahead and flag anything unclear.
How's the integration going on your side?
It's going as planned. Phase 1 went smoothly.
Great. Let me know when we go into phase 2.
Hi, we received a notice that some transactions went against your threshold.
Thanks for following up. Yes, three transactions went over the daily limit.
Could you go into detail on which ones?
I'll go through them in the attachment. The transactions occurred on March 12, 14, and 18.
Should we go ahead with submitting clarifications?
Yes, please go ahead. Go over each transaction and provide business rationale.
Understood. We'll go through the process and respond within 5 business days.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국 가맹점이 한도 위반 통지에 대한 답변을 요청했습니다. 무엇이 위배됐고, 어떻게 진행할지, 어떤 절차를 거쳐야 하는지 GO 동사로 정중하게 안내하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Account Director at an overseas merchant partner
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, our team got your threshold violation notice. Could you go into detail on which transactions went against the policy, and let us know how we should go ahead with the clarification process?

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
케이스 검토, 위반 분석, STR 진행 — GO 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: Did you go through the merchant's transaction history?
Yes. I went through all 6 months.
Good. Did anything go against expected patterns?
The case clearly goes against our risk policy.
Then go ahead and file.
Will do. I'll go over the draft with legal first.
Walk me through how the case went from alert to filing.
We went through the standard escalation. The alert went to my desk on day one.
What went against your initial assessment?
The volume went 3x higher than the merchant's stated business model.
Did you go into detail on the counterparty network?
We did. We went through 18 months of counterparty data.
How long did the process take to go from alert to filing?
It went through in 5 business days. We can go over the timeline if helpful.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU 검사관이 본인 팀의 케이스 진행 과정에 대해 인터뷰를 진행합니다. 어떤 단계로 진행됐고, 무엇이 정책에 위배됐고, 어떻게 결론까지 갔는지 GO 동사로 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: I'd like to go through the timeline today. Walk me from the moment the alert went out to when the STR went in. What went against expectations, and where did your team go into deeper analysis?

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
업계 진행, 트렌드 검토, 의견 교환 — 부드러운 GO 동사!

dialog.text: How's your year going?
It's going well. Lots of interesting cases.
Same here. Things have been going crazy lately.
Are you going to the keynote tomorrow?
Yes, I'm going. Are you?
Definitely. Let's go together.
How are AML investments going in Korea?
They're going up significantly. The industry is going through a transformation.
Are you going against the regional trend, or following it?
We're slightly ahead. Korean PGs are going into detail on automation earlier.
Could we go over your roadmap sometime?
Sure. Let's go grab coffee tomorrow and go through it.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 동료와 한국 AML 투자·자동화 트렌드를 비교 토론하세요. 어떻게 진행되는지, 무엇이 다른지, 향후 협업 방향을 GO 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Aiko, Head of Compliance at a Japanese fintech
rolePlay.aiOpening: Great session today! How are AML investments going in Korean PGs? In Japan we're going through a similar shift, but I want to go into detail on what's working in your market.

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
외출, 약속, 일상 변화 — 가장 친숙한 GO 동사 패턴!

dialog.text: Are you going anywhere this weekend?
I'm going to my parents' place.
Have fun! Go safely.
How's everything going?
Going well. Busy but good.
Glad to hear. Let's go for dinner soon.
How's the new role going for you?
Honestly, it's going better than I expected. But I went through a rough first month.
What went against your expectations?
The amount of context-switching. I had to go into detail on too many things at once.
How are you going about it now?
I go through priorities every Monday. That helps me not go crazy.

rolePlay.scenario: 친구와 카페에서 만나 새 직장 적응에 대한 솔직한 대화를 나누세요. 어떻게 진행되는지, 무엇이 예상과 달랐는지, 어떻게 대처하는지 GO 동사로 자연스럽게 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Min, a close friend who recently changed jobs too
rolePlay.aiOpening: So how's the new role really going? I know we both went through transitions this year — what's gone well, what's gone sideways? Don't hold back.
